creator: m.giglhuber@it-seminare.de
text:
Dear Sir or Madame,

IT-Seminare.de is one of the leading provider for IT trainings in Germany. We offer more than 1000 different IT trainings every year for IT professionals.

Could place our link on http://www.fi.freebsd.org/commercial/misc.html?

Our intention is to bring forward the Open Source Communities in Germany
We train and advance Open Source topics and host several Communities like a drupal user group or a java group.
If there are any questions, feel free to contact us. 

Best
Michael
